message:
feat(engine): add ambient mock guard regression suite, migration report, and rch artifact sync

Extends the ambient mock guard with fixture-based regression testing:
three scenarios (cfg_test_only, production_mock_reference, unguarded
module) verify that the guard correctly classifies each fixture tree
and produces the expected outcome, rule_ids, diagnostic_codes, and
source_paths. Results are written as a new regression report artifact.

New event fields: rule_id and source_path are now emitted alongside
diagnostic_id and file_path in violation events, giving downstream
consumers stable keys for filtering and aggregation.

A mock surface migration report artifact is also produced, tracking
the evolution of mock usage patterns across the workspace.

The rch runner script gains:
- Artifact sync from the rch worker via scp after remote execution
- Recoverable artifact timeout detection (remote succeeded, transfer
  timed out) with automatic recovery path
- Worker identity resolution from workers.toml for SSH artifact pull
- Absolute path handling for artifact_root

Integration tests updated to validate regression report contents,
new artifact file existence, new event fields in JSONL, and serde
roundtrips for all new types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -25,6 +25,8 @@ struct CommandOutput {
     schema_version: String,
     out_dir: String,
     ambient_mock_guard_report: String,
+    control_plane_mock_surface_migration_report: String,
+    control_plane_mock_guard_regression_report: String,
     trace_ids: String,
     run_manifest: String,
     events_jsonl: String,
@@ -81,6 +83,14 @@ fn run() -> Result<i32, String> {
         schema_version: OUTPUT_SCHEMA_VERSION.to_string(),
         out_dir: artifacts.out_dir.display().to_string(),
         ambient_mock_guard_report: artifacts.report_path.display().to_string(),
+        control_plane_mock_surface_migration_report: artifacts
+            .migration_report_path
+            .display()
+            .to_string(),
+        control_plane_mock_guard_regression_report: artifacts
+            .regression_report_path
+            .display()
+            .to_string(),
         trace_ids: artifacts.trace_ids_path.display().to_string(),
         run_manifest: artifacts.run_manifest_path.display().to_string(),
         events_jsonl: artifacts.events_path.display().to_string(),

@@ -15,7 +15,11 @@ artifact_root="${AMBIENT_MOCK_GUARD_ARTIFACT_ROOT:-artifacts/ambient_mock_guard}
 timestamp="$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
 target_dir="${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-/var/tmp/rch_target_franken_engine_ambient_mock_guard}"
 cargo_build_jobs="${CARGO_BUILD_JOBS:-2}"
-run_dir="${artifact_root}/${timestamp}"
+if [[ "${artifact_root}" = /* ]]; then
+  run_dir="${artifact_root}/${timestamp}"
+else
+  run_dir="${root_dir}/${artifact_root}/${timestamp}"
+fi
 rch_step_logs_dir="${run_dir}/rch_step_logs"
 
 mkdir -p "$run_dir" "$rch_step_logs_dir"
@@ -55,6 +59,21 @@ rch_remote_exit_code() {
   printf '%s\n' "${exit_line##*=}"
 }
 
+rch_recovered_success() {
+  local log_path="$1"
+  if rch_strip_ansi "$log_path" | grep -Eiq 'Remote command finished: exit=0|Finished.*profile|test result: ok\.' \
+    && ! rch_strip_ansi "$log_path" | grep -Eiq 'error(\[[[:alnum:]]+\])?:'; then
+    return 0
+  fi
+  return 1
+}
+
+rch_has_recoverable_artifact_timeout() {
+  local log_path="$1"
+  rch_strip_ansi "$log_path" | grep -Eiq \
+    'artifact retrieval timed out|artifact transfer timed out|timed out waiting for artifacts|failed to retrieve artifacts|failed to download artifacts'
+}
+
 rch_reject_local_fallback() {
   local log_path="$1"
   if rch_strip_ansi "$log_path" | grep -Eiq 'Remote execution failed: .*running locally|Remote toolchain failure, falling back to local|falling back to local|fallback to local|local fallback|running locally|\[RCH\] local \(|Failed to query daemon:.*running locally|Dependency preflight blocked remote execution|RCH-E326'; then
@@ -63,6 +82,61 @@ rch_reject_local_fallback() {
   fi
 }
 
+worker_identity_file() {
+  local worker_id="$1"
+
+  awk -v worker_id="$worker_id" '
+    /^\[\[workers\]\]/ {
+      in_block = 0
+      next
+    }
+    $0 == "id = \"" worker_id "\"" {
+      in_block = 1
+      next
+    }
+    in_block && /^identity_file = / {
+      gsub(/^identity_file = "/, "", $0)
+      gsub(/"$/, "", $0)
+      print
+      exit
+    }
+  ' "$HOME/.config/rch/workers.toml"
+}
+
+capture_selected_worker() {
+  local log_path="$1"
+  local worker_line worker_spec
+
+  worker_line="$(rch_strip_ansi "$log_path" | sed -n 's/.*Selected worker: \([^ ]*\) at \([^ ]*\) (.*/\1|\2/p' | tail -n 1 || true)"
+  if [[ -z "$worker_line" ]]; then
+    return 0
+  fi
+
+  last_worker_id="${worker_line%%|*}"
+  worker_spec="${worker_line#*|}"
+  last_worker_user="${worker_spec%@*}"
+  last_worker_host="${worker_spec#*@}"
+  last_worker_identity_file="$(worker_identity_file "$last_worker_id")"
+  last_worker_identity_file="${last_worker_identity_file/#\~/$HOME}"
+}
+
+sync_remote_run_dir() {
+  if [[ -z "${last_worker_user:-}" || -z "${last_worker_host:-}" || -z "${last_worker_identity_file:-}" ]]; then
+    echo "failed to resolve ambient mock guard worker SSH identity for artifact sync" >&2
+    return 1
+  fi
+
+  if ! scp -q -r \
+    -i "$last_worker_identity_file" \
+    -o BatchMode=yes \
+    -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \
+    "${last_worker_user}@${last_worker_host}:${run_dir}/." \
+    "${run_dir}/"; then
+    echo "failed to sync ambient mock guard artifacts from rch worker ${last_worker_id:-unknown}" >&2
+    return 1
+  fi
+}
+
 remote_code_allowed() {
   local code="$1"
   shift
@@ -76,6 +150,10 @@ remote_code_allowed() {
 }
 
 declare -a commands_run=()
+last_worker_id=""
+last_worker_user=""
+last_worker_host=""
+last_worker_identity_file=""
 step_index=0
 
 run_step() {
@@ -100,17 +178,25 @@ run_step() {
   status=$?
   set -e
 
-  if ! rch_reject_local_fallback "$log_path"; then
+  if [[ "$status" -eq 124 ]]; then
+    echo "rch command timed out after ${rch_timeout_seconds}s" >&2
     return 1
   fi
 
-  if [[ "$status" -eq 124 ]]; then
-    echo "rch command timed out after ${rch_timeout_seconds}s" >&2
+  if ! rch_reject_local_fallback "$log_path"; then
     return 1
   fi
 
   local remote_exit_code
   remote_exit_code="$(rch_remote_exit_code "$log_path" || true)"
+  if [[ "$status" -ne 0 ]]; then
+    if [[ "$remote_exit_code" == "0" ]] && rch_has_recoverable_artifact_timeout "$log_path"; then
+      echo "==> recovered: remote execution succeeded; artifact retrieval timed out" | tee -a "$log_path"
+    elif [[ -z "$remote_exit_code" ]] && rch_recovered_success "$log_path"; then
+      remote_exit_code="0"
+      echo "==> recovered: remote execution succeeded; remote exit marker missing" | tee -a "$log_path"
+    fi
+  fi
   if [[ -z "$remote_exit_code" ]]; then
     echo "rch output missing remote exit marker" >&2
     return 1
@@ -119,6 +205,8 @@ run_step() {
     echo "unexpected remote exit code ${remote_exit_code} for: ${command_text}" >&2
     return 1
   fi
+
+  capture_selected_worker "$log_path"
 }
 
 run_step \
@@ -131,8 +219,12 @@ run_step \
   0 2 -- \
   cargo run -p frankenengine-engine --bin franken_ambient_mock_guard -- --out-dir "${run_dir}"
 
+sync_remote_run_dir
+
 for artifact in \
   ambient_mock_guard_report.json \
+  control_plane_mock_surface_migration_report.json \
+  control_plane_mock_guard_regression_report.json \
   trace_ids.json \
   run_manifest.json \
   events.jsonl \
